title: Harborview Condos - As-built drawings (panel upgrade)
body:
Harborview Condos panel upgrade - as-builts

24 units; service entrance to subpanel layout. CO-1, CO-2, CO-3 incorporated. CO-4 pending HPC sign-off (none - HPC applies to Bay View only).

title: Harborview - Final walk punch list (Oct 8, 2026)
body:
Punch items as of 2026-09-30

  • Unit 14 - island GFCI explanation (NEC 210.8(B)(2)) - DOCUMENTED
  • Bronze nameplates on main panels - pending
  • Units 16-18 trim-out after plumbing rough-in

title: Bay View Historic Home - Permit BV-2026-0438 + HPC amendment
body:
Bay View Historic rewire

HPC amendment 2026-09-24

  1. Oil-rubbed bronze EMT on 1st floor visible runs
  2. NO plaster cuts in rooms 1A, 1B, stair hall
  3. Satin-brass toggle only on 1st floor

Effective immediately.

title: Residential Solar - install runbook (draft, pending NABCEP)
body:
8.4 kW reference array - residential

21 panels Qcells QPEAK-DUO-G10-400 + Enphase IQ8M-7.6. Site assessment, rapid shutdown (NEC 690.12), production meter, WI net metering interconnect. Reviewed against NABCEP study plan.
